root_cause: Visual routes closed through a reconstructed Business Assessment URL, which forced route rehydration and could expose the entry/payment area instead of returning to the existing result context.
visual_dna_close_behavior: Close returns to the existing Business Assessment result history entry when launched from the result; otherwise it falls back to the safe returnTo URL.
five_futures_close_behavior: Close returns to the existing Business Assessment result history entry when launched from the result; otherwise it falls back to the safe returnTo URL.
production_smoke_plan: Visual DNA close returns to Business Assessment result context
Five Futures close returns to Business Assessment result context
limits: This repair changes only visual return-state behavior.
No payment, Stripe, access grant, assessment generation, or storage behavior changed.
